category_sources: Official homepage/source README describes interface activity reporting like vmstat/iostat.
source_facts.description says ifstat reports network interface bandwidth.
display_name_sources: Official homepage URL and project materials use ifstat.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the upstream project homepage and best official documentation surface identified.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official upstream source-control repository was not identified. Debian Salsa links found are packaging VCS, not upstream project repositories.
tags_sources: Package facts list ifstat as a CLI executable; official/source README notes interface activity and optional SNMP polling.
source_facts.description says network interface bandwidth reporting.
